description: Balanced financial resilience across solvency liquidity infrastructure governance inclusion exposure and implementation burden.
Prioritizes capital adequacy loss absorption leverage constraint and solvency protection.
Prioritizes liquidity buffers stable funding market liquidity and lender-of-last-resort readiness.
Prioritizes payments clearing settlement cyber operational continuity and market infrastructure robustness.
Prioritizes supervision macroprudential governance stress testing crisis protocols and resolution readiness.
Prioritizes household financial resilience fair credit payment access insurance savings and small-firm recovery finance.
Penalizes systemic exposure including leverage contagion non-bank risk climate risk common exposures and operational concentration.
Penalizes implementation burden when regulatory legal political fiscal or operational capacity is constrained.
